titleStmt.title: SII 22.24: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 24. (A.R. No. 24 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME BASE. PARAK. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—13th YEAR, (A.D. 1026)

summary.p: The introduction is Tirumanni vaḷara etc., the list of conquests enumerated extending up to that of the Gaṅga. The inscription records the gift of a golden kalaśa set with 9 gems of high quality and weighing about 109 kaḻañju, to God Kālakāladēvar by one [Sāga]ṇi Vaḍugaṉ of Nallūr in Nallūr-nāḍu a division of Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu. This gift is said to have been got engraved on stone, by the sabhā of Tirukkaḍavūr on receipt of a royal order to that effect.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilaṉ maṭantaiyum porceya pāvaiyum cirtaṉi celviyum taṉ perunteviyarākki yiṉpuṟa neṭutiṉa lūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭar vaṉaveli paṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇal karumuṟaḷ ma
ṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraiyartam muṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavaṉpakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum In=tira nāramum teṇṭirai yiḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikeraḷar muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉa
mākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatirvelai tol peruṅkāval pala pa[ ḻan=tivum ce] ruviṟ ciṉavi Irupattorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paraicurāman melvarum cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟ ṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ
ṭoḷicca ceyaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiyil Ilaṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamum navanetikkula pperumalaikaḷum vi cakkarakkoṭṭamum mutirai vaṭavalla maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷa nāmaṇaikoṇaiyum veñcilai virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭai
paḻaṉa mācuṇi tecamum mayarvil vaṇkirttiayartinakaravaiyil can=tiraṉ tolkulat tintirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu pala taṉattoṭu niṟai taṉakuvaiyum kiṭṭariñ ceṟimuṟai Oṭṭaviṣayamum pūcurarcer nal kosalaināṭum tarmapālaṉai vemmuṉai
yaḻiccu vaṇṭuṟai colai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇuka tākki tikkaṇikirtti takkanalāṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻin=toṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaḻal caṅkuoṭṭal mahipālaṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟalāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nitti
la neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum netimalar tirtta teṟipuṉal kaṅkaiyum māperun=taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājentracoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Amparnāṭu paṭai Eviya tirukkaṭavūr śrīkālakāladevarkku nitta(l) vinota(l)va
ḷanāṭṭu nallūrnāṭṭu nallūr [ sāka] ṇivaṭukaṉ poṉ Ippoṉiṉ kalacam kallil veṭṭukaveṉṟu tirukkaṭavūr sabhaiyomukku tirumukam prasātañ ceytu van=tamaiyil poṉṉiṉ kalacam Oṉṟum Itiṉ vāyiṉ Aḻuttiṉa cān=tivarṉṉam Oṉpatum Uḷpaṭa niṟai poṉ nūṟṟu Orupatiṉ kaḻañce IThe continuation of this seems to be built in and hence inaccessible.
Digital edition of SII 22.24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
